headline: Charles Schwab Sets Out to Build Its Digital Assets Team Ahead of Crypto Trading Rollout
summary: Charles Schwab is taking another step toward its crypto ambitions. The Wall Street brokerage giant is now actively hiring blockchain engineers, security specialists and crypto product managers. This comes as the $19 trillion firm is now aggressively building out its Digital Assets division ahead of its planned cryptocurrency trading rollout. Jake Hahn, a member of
